title: Prepare The Batch
purpose: Prepare a small reviewed batch before touching data/questions.json.
steps: Use 10-25 questions per batch first.
Keep all new question IDs unique.
Use only existing test, skill, subject and topic IDs.
Keep status as draft until reviewed.
Confirm every question has English and Urdu explanations.
checks: No copied copyrighted passages without permission

title: Validate JSON Structure
purpose: Make sure the site can still load the question file after editing.
steps: Paste new records carefully inside the questions array.
Check commas between objects.
Parse the JSON before committing.
Confirm all strings use double quotes.
Avoid hidden line breaks inside fields.

title: Test In Practice Engine
purpose: Open the batch in the live practice engine before publishing.
steps: Filter by the target test, skill or subject.
Attempt each new question.
Click Show Answer.
Click Explanation.
Click Urdu Explanation.
Click Study Topic.

title: Publish And Update Tracking
purpose: Publish only reviewed items and keep expansion targets accurate.
steps: Change reviewed questions from draft to published.
Update currentSampleCount in question-bank targets.
Add a changelog note if the batch is important.
Commit the batch with a clear message.
Push and test the GitHub Pages site.
